task_description: GeoUMKM V4.0 Phase 1 improvements: expand map data to all 595 kecamatan, fix cluster names in knowledge-base.ts, expand filter options (27 kabupaten, all jenis_usaha), and create practical manual setup notes

verification.summary: pnpm build passes with all 16 routes compiled. Review issues fixed: (1) Comparison dropdowns now use composite kecamatan|kabupaten values for unique keys and correct lookups. (2) recommendData expanded from 11 entries (3 kabupaten) to 104 entries covering all 26 kabupaten.
